mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling over recent months, discount rates and recession odds both decline, supporting equity multiples and risk appetite. A sustained easing trend should lift S&P 500 returns over the next month.
evidence_refs: fact:Fed funds was 1.68% in 2022-07 vintage, still below restrictive territory
failure_condition: If FEDFUNDS declines over a 3-month window but next-20-day SPX returns are negative in more than 55% of such episodes, or Rank IC stays below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: A high or rising FEDFUNDS rate above a restrictive threshold tightens financial conditions and compresses equity valuations. Once the policy rate is elevated, forward S&P 500 returns over the next month should be negative.
failure_condition: If triggered observations with FEDFUNDS > 4.5% produce positive 20-day SPX returns in at least 60% of cases, or the average forward return is not below the unconditional mean by at least 1 percentage point, reject.

mechanism_narrative: A broad demand slowdown signaled by falling RSAFS and HOUST indicates weaker consumption and housing activity, which should pressure earnings expectations and lower S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS and HOUST were both below revised levels in the 2022-06 vintage snapshot
failure_condition: If simultaneous 3-month declines in RSAFS and HOUST are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 55% of episodes, or the interaction term has no incremental predictive power versus either series alone, reject.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE from already low levels marks deteriorating labor demand and higher recession risk, which should lower S&P 500 forward returns over the next month as earnings expectations are repriced.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE was 3.5% in the 2022-07 vintage snapshot
failure_condition: If UNRATE increases by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months and the next-20-day SPX return is positive in at least 60% of cases, or the average forward return is not negative, reject.

mechanism_narrative: Improving INDPRO signals stronger real output and utilization, which lifts cyclical earnings expectations and supports S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal is strongest when industrial production is rising on a 3-month basis.
failure_condition: If positive 3-month changes in INDPRO fail to correspond to higher 20-day SPX returns than negative changes, or Rank IC falls below 0.03 in any rolling 2-year window, reject.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains below inflation, real policy rates stay deeply negative and equities initially benefit from liquidity and nominal revenue effects. The mechanism predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days until policy catches up.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation rises faster than FEDFUNDS over 3 months
failure_condition: If episodes with rising CPIAUCSL and lagging FEDFUNDS do not show positive 5-day SPX returns more often than not, or the sign flips once the policy gap is included, reject.

mechanism_narrative: A rising PAYEMS series combined with low UNRATE confirms broad labor-market strength and income growth, which should support S&P 500 returns over the next quarter through stronger consumption and earnings.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS remained near 152.5 million and UNRATE was 3.5% in the 2022-07 vintage snapshot
failure_condition: If joint episodes of rising PAYEMS and low UNRATE do not produce above-baseline 60-day SPX returns, or if PAYEMS alone explains the effect without UNRATE interaction, reject.

mechanism_narrative: A housing downturn signaled by falling HOUST, especially when paired with weaker RSAFS, identifies a demand-led slowdown that should depress S&P 500 returns over the next month as cyclical sectors and earnings expectations weaken.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value was 1559.0 in 2022-06 and RSAFS vintage value was 680591.0 in 2022-06
failure_condition: If a >5% two-month drop in HOUST, especially alongside declining RSAFS, is not followed by negative 20-day SPX returns more often than not, or the combined signal adds no value versus HOUST alone, reject.
